result.reason: Provide tooling to easily copy username and password to clipboard for web connections opened in an external browser, improving usability.
result.approach: Add 'Copy Username' and 'Copy Password' context menu items for HTTP/HTTPS connections. These actions will retrieve the credentials from the ConnectionInfo object and copy them to the system clipboard.
